events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes structural bolting where turn-of-nut match marks are absent or not rotated. This is a quality issue - the turn-of-nut method requires match marks to verify proper rotation/tightening. Without match marks, there's no verification that the bolts were properly tightened.

This is a non-compliant condition. The turn-of-nut method per RCSC requires match marks to be placed and the nut rotated the specified amount from the snug-tight condition. Absent match marks means the tightening cannot be verified.

Decision: fail - non-compliant
Risk: medium to high - structural bolting integrity
Work stage: rough-complete
Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant
